name: adamsimms-xyz
description: Personal portfolio website for Adam Simms - technologist, designer, artist, and educator

scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run optimize
scripts.build:css: npx postcss css/styles.css -o css/styles.min.css && npx postcss css/normalize.css -o css/normalize.min.css
scripts.minify:css: npx clean-css-cli -o css/styles.min.css css/styles.css && npx clean-css-cli -o css/normalize.min.css css/normalize.css
scripts.lint: npm run lint:html && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:js
scripts.deploy: echo 'Deploying to GitHub Pages' && git push origin main

author: Adam Simms
